steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon separates the blank from evidence showing the program identified sidewalks "more accurately" and distinguished between materials—demonstrating superior capability compared to the road-map method.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
"Tip" here means tilt or incline — Gogol tilts his head backward to look up at a kite flying very high. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Lean: tilt or incline in a direction — Gogol tilts his head back; fits the physical action perfectly. ✓
  • Choice B — Create: make or produce — does not describe a physical head movement. ✗
  • Choice C — Pay: give money or give attention to — "pay his head back" is not a meaningful phrase in this context. ✗
  • Choice D — Teach: instruct — unrelated to a child watching a kite. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
